FitMon
Home Profile Workout Session Logout

Live Session

Connect doctor and patient in a monitored workout session.

Doctor – Session Setup

Generate a code, share it with your patient, then start the live dashboard.

1

Generate a session code

A unique 6-character code is created on the server and linked to your account.

2

Share the code with your patient

Session code
——————

Your patient enters this code on their Session page to join.

3

Open your live dashboard

Once you are ready, validate the code and open your monitoring dashboard.

Patient – Join Session

Enter the 6-character code provided by your doctor to connect to the live session.

After validation you will be redirected to your live workout view.
